title: Build the bee.mjs unified dispatcher (--help, --help --json, nearest-match, manifest hash)
action: CORRECTED MECHANISM (validating iteration 1 found the original 'delegate to the helper module's handler' framing unbuildable - the 4 CLI files export nothing; fix per user decision 2026-07-11): all 4 existing CLI entrypoints are already thin wrappers importing exported functions from lib/*.mjs (bee_cells.mjs imports listCells/readyCells/readCell/addCell/claimCell/recordVerify/capCell/blockCell/dropCell/setTier/judgeCell from lib/cells.mjs; the other 3 follow the identical pattern from their own lib modules). Write bee.mjs as a thin dispatcher that imports the SAME lib/*.mjs functions directly - zero import of, or dependency on, the 4 CLI files' own unexported main()/argv-parsing code. Parse the first argv token as a command group (status/cells/reservations/decisions), validate the call via validate-args.mjs against the matching registry entry, and only on a valid call invoke the matching lib function directly, formatting output to match what the existing CLI's main() currently prints for that same call (read each existing CLI's output-formatting logic in read_first to replicate it exactly - this is what the parity must-have below checks). On an invalid call, return the structured {ok:false,error} shape instead of calling the lib function. Implement --help (prose rendering of the registry) and --help --json (raw registry, Claude-tool-schema shaped per D3), both reading the one registry from cell harness-integration-1. Add nearest-match suggestion (edit-distance against registered command names) for an unrecognized command. Add manifest content-hash tracking: hash the registry content each call; persist the last-seen hash in a small state file (name/location: agent's choice, document it) since bee.mjs runs as a fresh process per invocation with no built-in session concept; if the hash differs from what's persisted, include manifest_changed:true plus a one-line hint in the response. SCOPE GAP CLOSED (validating iteration 1, coherence lens): implement a deprecated/use_instead redirect - if the matched registry entry has a non-null `deprecated: {since, use_instead}` field (cell harness-integration-1 defines the field shape; entries are null until a future phase actually deprecates something, but the DISPATCH LOGIC for honoring a non-null value must exist now), respond with a redirect message naming `use_instead` instead of executing or returning a bare not-found - this is required by implement-plan.md's Scope and plan.md's test matrix, not optional polish.

truths: bee --help --json parses as valid JSON and lists every existing subcommand
bee cells ready output is byte-identical to bee_cells.mjs ready output (parity, per D5) - verified by running both and diffing stdout
a call with a typo'd command name returns a nearest-match suggestion, not a bare not-found
a registry content change is reflected as manifest_changed:true on the next call
a call matching a registry entry with a non-null deprecated field returns a redirect naming use_instead, not a bare execution or not-found

artifacts.substantive: working dispatcher, no TODO stubs, routes to all 4 existing helper groups by calling their lib/*.mjs functions directly

key_links: bee.mjs imports command-registry.mjs and validate-args.mjs from cell harness-integration-1

bee.mjs imports its command logic from lib/cells.mjs, lib/state.mjs, lib/reservations.mjs, lib/decisions.mjs, and (for the status group specifically) lib/capture.mjs + lib/backlog.mjs - the same lib modules the 4 existing CLI files already import, never from the CLI files themselves
prohibitions: No edits to bee_status.mjs, bee_cells.mjs, bee_reservations.mjs, or bee_decisions.mjs - these files are read for reference (output-format parity) only, never imported or modified
No edits to any lib/*.mjs file's existing exported functions - bee.mjs is a new consumer of them, not a modifier

trace.outcome: Built skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs, the unified CLI dispatcher: parses "bee <group> [<action>] [--flags]" (status has no subcommand; cells/reservations/decisions dot-join group.action), validates every call via validate-args.mjs against cell harness-integration-1's registry, and on a valid call invokes the SAME lib/*.mjs functions the 4 existing entrypoints already import (D5) — reimplementing each one's exact output-formatting logic for byte-identical parity, never importing/spawning the 4 CLI files themselves. Implements --help / --help --json (D3 tool-schema manifest, helper field stripped), Levenshtein nearest-match suggestion on an unrecognized command, sha256 manifest content-hash drift tracking persisted at .bee/manifest-hash.json (manifest_changed only appears in the response when true, preserving byte-parity in the steady state), and the deprecated/use_instead redirect dispatch logic (no live registry entry is deprecated yet; exercised via a synthetic entry in tests). Extended tests/test_bee_cli.mjs (cell harness-integration-1's file) with 35 new checks: pure-logic units (parseFlags/resolveCommand/nearestCommandName/deprecatedRedirect/computeManifestHash) plus end-to-end dispatcher coverage in a second isolated temp repo — including literal stdout diffs against bee_status.mjs, bee_cells.mjs ready (json+text), bee_reservations.mjs list, and bee_decisions.mjs active. 67/67 passing; zero regression (test_lib.mjs 124/124, test_onboard_bee.mjs unaffected).
